product_overview: Super Admin frontend for EduHub: a Next.js-based control panel to manage organizations, MockBook content (test series, categories, featured), analytics and platform-wide settings for a multi-tenant EdTech platform.
core_goals: Provide Super Admins a secure, centralized UI to manage organizations, billing and platform-level features.
Enable creation, management and discovery of MockBook content (test series, categories, featured series) with multi-step authoring flows.
Surface platform analytics and KPIs for informed decision-making and to monitor revenue, usage and MockBook performance.
Expose organization-scoped MockTest and Q-Bank management to operate on behalf of organizations (view-as-org) while preserving multi-tenant isolation.

features.name: Login
features.description: Super Admin authenticates using email and password to gain access to the Super Admin dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email input field -> Fill in password input field -> Click the Login button -> See dashboard at /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email input field -> Fill in incorrect password -> Click the Login button -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: MockBook Dashboard
features.description: Platform-wide MockBook overview: KPI cards, organization switcher, tabbed MockBook sections and quick navigation to categories, featured and create flows.
user_flows: Navigate to /mockbook -> View KPI stats cards (Platform Tests, Series, Attempts, Students, Live, Revenue) -> Click Select Organization button -> Open org switcher -> Select an organization -> Switch to Test Series tab -> See Test Series list at /mockbook/test-series -> Click Create New Series button -> Navigate to /mockbook/test-series/create
Navigate to /mockbook -> Use Search in Test Series tab -> Type query that returns no results -> See empty state or 'No results' message

features.name: Test Series List
features.description: List and manage all test series with search, category/status filters and per-series actions (Edit, Duplicate, Feature, Analytics, Delete).
user_flows: Navigate to /mockbook/test-series -> Search series by name -> Filter by category (e.g. SSC) -> Filter by status (e.g. Active) -> Click Manage button on a series row -> Open series detail at /mockbook/test-series/[seriesId]
Navigate to /mockbook/test-series -> Search series by name -> Apply filters that match nothing -> See 'No series found' empty state -> Optionally clear filters

features.name: Create Test Series Wizard (6-step)
features.description: Multi-step wizard to author a new test series (meta, test counts, tests selection, pricing, unlock rules, review & publish).
user_flows: Navigate to /mockbook/test-series/create -> Step 1: Fill in series name -> Select category -> Choose target (Platform/Org) -> Upload thumbnail image -> Click Next -> Step 2: Set test counts per type using +/- buttons -> Click Next -> Step 3: Add existing tests or create new ones -> Click Next -> Step 4: Choose pricing type, set price and validity -> Click Next -> Step 5: Choose unlock rule -> Click Next -> Step 6: Review summary checklist -> Click Publish -> See success confirmation and navigate to /mockbook/test-series
Navigate to /mockbook/test-series/create -> Step 1: Leave required fields empty -> Click Next -> See validation error message for missing required fields and remain on Step 1

features.name: Exam Categories Management
features.description: Manage exam categories: view grid of categories, expand a category to see featured series, and add/edit/delete categories.
user_flows: Navigate to /mockbook/categories -> View exam category cards grid -> Click a category card -> Expand featured series for that category -> Click Add Category button -> Fill category name -> Click Save -> See new category in the grid
Navigate to /mockbook/categories -> Click Delete icon on a category card -> Confirm deletion in dialog -> See deletion error or failure toast if backend persistence is not available

features.name: Featured Series Management
features.description: View and reorder featured series per category, toggle featured status and persist ordering.
user_flows: Navigate to /mockbook/featured -> View ordered list of series -> Toggle featured status using toggle button on a series -> Click up arrow to move a series up -> Click Save Order button -> See success toast confirming order saved
Navigate to /mockbook/featured -> Reorder series using up/down arrows -> Click Save Order button -> See toast but observe order is not persisted (UI-only limitation) or see backend error toast

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Platform MockBook analytics: selectable date ranges, KPI cards, charts and CSV export for reporting.
user_flows: Navigate to /mockbook/analytics -> Select date range dropdown (30 days) -> View KPI cards (DAU, Tests Attempted, Enrollments, Revenue) -> View daily tests bar chart -> Click Export CSV button -> Download CSV file
Navigate to /mockbook/analytics -> Select date range -> See charts fail to load -> Display error state and 'Try again' option or fallback message

features.name: Organization MockTest Management
features.description: Manage mock tests for a specific organization with a folder hierarchy (Category → Series → Folder), create categories/series/folders and create mock tests in a series.
user_flows: Navigate to /mockbook/org/[orgId]/mocktests -> Click on an Exam Category card to drill down -> Click on a Test Series card to drill down -> Click on a Folder card to view tests -> Click Create MockTest button (enabled inside a Series) -> Fill test name, type, duration, marks -> Select QBank set for the test -> Submit to create the test -> See new test listed in the folder/test list

Navigate to /mockbook/org/[orgId]/mocktests -> Click Create MockTest button inside a Series -> Fill form with invalid duration value -> Click Submit -> See validation error message and test not created

features.name: Organization Management
features.description: View and manage organizations: search, filter, view details, change plan and toggle organization status.
user_flows: Navigate to /organizations -> Search organizations by name or ID -> Filter by plan or status -> Click on an organization row -> Navigate to /organizations/[orgId] -> Change organization plan -> Confirm change -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /organizations -> Click Toggle organization status -> Confirm action -> See error toast if backend update fails (status remains unchanged)

routes.description: Super Admin login page with email/password
Super Admin main dashboard with KPI stats
List all organizations with search and filters
Super Admin MockBook dashboard with 8 tabs
Test series list with search and filters
Series detail with tests table and analytics
Platform analytics with charts and revenue breakdown
Org-level mock test management with folder hierarchy

features.name: Login
features.description: Super Admin logs in with email and password
user_interactions: Fill in email input field
Fill in password input field
Click the Login button
See error message on invalid credentials
See dashboard on successful login

features.name: MockBook Dashboard
features.description: View platform-wide MockBook stats and manage tabs including Test Series, Live Tests, PYQ Bank, Pricing, Analytics, AI Quotas, Taxonomy
user_interactions: View KPI stats cards (Platform Tests, Series, Attempts, Students, Live, Revenue)
Click Select Organization button to open org switcher
Switch between 8 tabs (Test Series, Live Tests, Free Quizzes, PYQ Bank, Pricing, Analytics, AI Quotas, Taxonomy)
Search and filter test series in Test Series tab
View live tests with status badges in Live Tests tab
See revenue breakdown in Pricing tab
Navigate to Categories page via header button
Navigate to Featured page via header button
Click Create New Series button

features.name: Test Series List
features.description: List all test series with search and category/status filters
user_interactions: Search series by name
Filter by category (SSC, Banking, NEET, etc.)
Filter by status (Active, Draft, Scheduled, Archived)
Click Manage button on a series row
Click Create New Series button
Open dropdown for Edit, Duplicate, Feature, Analytics, Delete actions

features.name: Create Test Series Wizard
features.description: 6-step wizard to create a new test series
user_interactions: Step 1 - Fill in series name, select category, choose target (Platform/Org), add description
Step 1 - Select series color tag
Step 1 - Upload thumbnail image
Step 2 - Set test counts per type using +/- buttons
Step 3 - Add existing tests or create new ones
Step 4 - Choose pricing type (Free/Partly Free/Paid), set price and validity
Step 5 - Choose unlock rule (All available, Weekly, Sequential, Custom)
Step 6 - Review summary checklist and click Publish
Click Next to move forward between steps
Click Previous to go back

features.name: Exam Categories Management
features.description: Manage exam categories displayed on the platform
user_interactions: View exam category cards grid
Click a card to expand featured series for that category
Click Add Category button
Click Edit or Delete icons on a category card

features.name: Featured Series Management
features.description: Manage which series are featured on the homepage and their order
user_interactions: View ordered list of series
Toggle featured status using toggle button
Click up/down arrows to reorder series
Click Save Order button
View category-wise featured sections

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: View platform analytics with KPIs, charts, and revenue breakdown
user_interactions: Select date range from dropdown (7, 30, 90 days)
View KPI cards (DAU, Tests Attempted, Enrollments, Revenue)
View daily tests bar chart
View top series by enrollment table
View top tests by attempts table
View revenue breakdown bars
Click Export CSV button

features.name: Organization MockTest Management
features.description: Create and manage mock tests for a specific organization using a 3-level folder hierarchy
user_interactions: Navigate through folder hierarchy (Exam Category > Test Series > Folder)
Click on an Exam Category card to drill down
Click on a Test Series card to drill down
Click on a Folder card to view tests
Click New Category/Series/Folder button
Click Create MockTest button (only enabled inside a Series)
Fill test name, type, duration, marks in create dialog
Select QBank set for the test
Submit to create the test
Filter tests by status and type
Search tests by name

features.name: Organization Management
user_interactions: Search organizations by name or ID
Filter by plan or status
Click on an organization to view details
Change organization plan
Toggle organization status

known_limitations.issue: Test series create wizard does not connect to backend API yet
known_limitations.impact: Publishing navigates back without actually saving to database

known_limitations.issue: Categories page uses UI-only mock data
known_limitations.impact: Add/Edit/Delete do not persist to backend

known_limitations.issue: Featured page reordering is UI-only (no save API)
known_limitations.impact: Order saved button shows toast but does not call backend

known_limitations.issue: Analytics page uses hardcoded mock data
known_limitations.impact: No real API data yet; KPIs and charts are static

known_limitations.issue: Series detail page uses hardcoded series data
known_limitations.impact: Only S001 shows real data; other IDs fall back to default
